description_long: This electric drill features a robust, cylindrical black body with a prominent metallic chuck at the front, designed to hold various drill bits. The side of the drill displays a visible brown gear mechanism, suggesting an exposed or stylized gearbox for torque adjustment. The handle is integrated into the main body, with a small, rounded protrusion on top that may serve as a secondary grip or control lever. The front end is equipped with a three-pronged metallic clamp, which appears to be the bit holder or a specialized attachment. The overall design is industrial, with a mix of matte and glossy finishes, and the materials suggest a combination of metal and high-strength plastic. No visible power cord or battery pack is present, and there are no clear brand markings or logos.
description: A black and metallic electric drill with a visible brown gear, three-pronged front clamp, and a compact, industrial design. The body is mostly black with metallic and brown accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black cylindrical body, brown gear mechanism, and the three-pronged metallic clamp at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-pronged clamp and the small rounded control lever on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the gear and clamp visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid black cylindrical back and the top-mounted control lever.
